Simulation study

Author

Maciej Beręsewicz

Bias

Continuous outcomes (y11, y12)

p <- ggplot(results_cont, aes(x = basis, y = bias, fill = estimator)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_grid(dataset ~ target, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_sim + palette_sim +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "Bias", fill = "Estimator")
p
ggsave("../results/figures/bias-cont.png", p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

Binary outcomes (y21, y22)

p <- ggplot(results_bin, aes(x = basis, y = bias, fill = estimator)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_grid(dataset ~ target, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_sim + palette_sim +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "Bias", fill = "Estimator")
p
ggsave("../results/figures/bias-bin.png", p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

RMSE

Continuous outcomes (y11, y12)

p <- ggplot(summary_cont, aes(x = basis, y = rmse, fill = estimator)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge()) +
  facet_grid(dataset ~ target, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_sim + palette_sim +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "RMSE", fill = "Estimator")
p
ggsave("../results/figures/rmse-cont.png", p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

Binary outcomes (y21, y22)

p <- ggplot(summary_bin, aes(x = basis, y = rmse, fill = estimator)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge()) +
  facet_grid(dataset ~ target, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_sim + palette_sim +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "RMSE", fill = "Estimator")
p
ggsave("../results/figures/rmse-bin.png", p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

CI Coverage

Continuous outcomes (y11, y12)

p <- ggplot(summary_cont, aes(x = basis, y = coverage, fill = estimator)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge()) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.95, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_grid(dataset ~ target) +
  theme_sim + palette_sim +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "Coverage", fill = "Estimator")
p
Warning: Removed 4 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
(`geom_col()`).
ggsave("../results/figures/coverage-cont.png", p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
Warning: Removed 4 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
(`geom_col()`).

Binary outcomes (y21, y22)

p <- ggplot(summary_bin, aes(x = basis, y = coverage, fill = estimator)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge()) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.95, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_grid(dataset ~ target) +
  theme_sim + palette_sim +
  labs(x = "Basis", y = "Coverage", fill = "Estimator")
p
Warning: Removed 4 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
(`geom_col()`).
ggsave("../results/figures/coverage-bin.png", p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
